title: Special Methods and Pythonic Object Behavior
description: Make domain values readable, comparable, hashable, iterable, callable, and resource-safe only where meaningful. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of Pythonic domain and collection objects while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Implement data-model protocols as coherent semantic sets.
Keep equality, ordering, hashing, representation, and container behavior internally consistent.
Avoid surprising operator overloads that obscure domain meaning.
